name: Markdown2Html
description: Convert Markdown files to HTML for publishing as ServiceNow knowledge base articles
author: sethbacon

inputs.name: mode
inputs.label: Conversion mode
inputs.helpMarkDown: Choose how to supply input files.

inputs.name: primaryFile
inputs.label: Primary Markdown file
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to the primary Markdown file whose YAML front-matter drives multi-file composition.

inputs.name: inputFiles
inputs.label: Input files (one path per line)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Paths to Markdown files to convert and combine. Separate paths with a newline or a comma.

inputs.name: outputFile
inputs.label: Output HTML file
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to the output HTML file.

inputs.name: title
inputs.label: Document title
inputs.helpMarkDown: Title for the generated HTML document.

inputs.name: sections
inputs.label: Add file sections
inputs.helpMarkDown: Add file names as section headers before each file's content.

inputs.name: debug
inputs.label: Debug output
inputs.helpMarkDown: Print additional debug information during conversion.

outputVariables.name: htmlFilePath
outputVariables.description: Absolute path to the generated HTML file.

messages.IncludeOutsidePrimaryDir: Include '%s' resolves outside the primary file's directory ('%s'): '%s'
messages.IncludeCycleDetected: Cycle detected: '%s' is already in the include chain.
messages.IncludeHasKbKey: Include file '%s' has a 'kb-key' front-matter field. Include files must not be primaries.
